metadata.description: Outbound change control for AI coding agents — action and content, local-first, with signed audit receipts.

plugins.name: agent-guard
plugins.description: Gate git push, npm publish, docker push, gh release, non-local HTTP mutations, and rm -rf before they happen — a PreToolUse decision boundary for Claude Code backed by a YAML policy and Ed25519-signed audit receipts. Local-first: no cloud, no telemetry.
